drl:
rule "R0"
salience 4
no-loop
when
    T0(f0 not in (-0.5))
    T0(f0 <= 3.5, $b0_1_0 : f0, $b0_1_1 : f0)
    not T1(f0 != true, f2 != -1.5, f1 > $b0_1_1)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T1($b1_0_0 : f2, $b1_0_1 : f0, f0 == false)
then
    $p1_0.setF0(true);
    $p1_0.setF2($b1_0_0);
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f2 in (4.0, -1000000007, -2.5), f0 != false, $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f3)
then
end
rule "R3"
no-loop
when
    $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1(true, $p3_0.getF0(), $p3_0.getF0(), true));
    insert(new T1(false, $b3_0_0, $b3_0_0, false));
end
